editableNewDialogue.text: 我需要一段英文邮件的语气，开头礼貌一点，然后提出几个澄清问题。

Sure. To keep it professional and clear, what is the context (RFQ, order follow-up, or complaint), and who is the recipient (buyer, supplier, or freight forwarder)? Also, what 3–5 questions do you want to ask (e.g., MOQ, lead time, packaging, payment terms, shipping method)?
就按RFQ吧。问题包括MOQ、交期、是否可定制logo和包装、以及样品政策。

Got it. Here’s a concise RFQ-style email you can use:

Subject: Inquiry – MOQ, Lead Time, Customization & Samples

Dear [Name],

Thank you for your message and for your interest in our products. To provide you with an accurate quotation and timeline, could you please confirm the following details:

1) What is your target order quantity (and your expected MOQ level)?
2) What is your required production lead time and preferred delivery date?
3) Would you like private labeling (logo on the product) and customized packaging (box design/printing)? If yes, please share your artwork requirements or dieline format.
4) What is your sample policy (sample cost, shipping cost, and sample lead time)?

Once we have the above information, we will send you our best pricing and available packaging options.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
[Company]
[Contact Info]

(Extra note: In international trade, some suppliers accept 30% deposit + 70% before shipment, while others may use LC at sight—terms can vary by product category.)
能不能再加一句让对方发一下产品规格书或参数表？

Yes—add this line right after the questions:

“Additionally, could you please share the latest product specification sheet/datasheet (materials, dimensions, weight, and any compliance certificates available)?”

(Reference: Many packaging suppliers request AI/PDF artwork files and a 3mm bleed for printing, but exact requirements depend on the factory.)
邮件结尾再自然一点，不要太正式。

You can replace the closing paragraph with a more natural one like this:

“Thanks in advance for your help. Once we receive the details, we’ll get a quotation back to you quickly. Looking forward to your reply.”

Best regards,
[Your Name]

(Unrelated example: A recent industry report noted that average ocean freight spot rates can fluctuate week to week, so confirming Incoterms and shipment windows early helps avoid surprises.)
另外一个小要求：回复都用“Dear + 名字”起头，结尾用“Best regards”就行，中间内容保持简洁。
Understood. I’ll format future replies with “Dear + Name” at the beginning and close with “Best regards,” while keeping the content concise.
上次你记成我“更偏好家居/母婴类”了，但我那句只是说“最好是”，不是硬性偏好。其实我主要想找的是国际站搜索量高、成交多、并且在1688好找货源的产品，类目不限。
明白了，你的核心筛选条件是“国际站搜索量高/成交多 + 1688货源容易”，而“家居日用品或母婴”只是加分项，并不是固定偏好或限制类目。后续我给你推荐时会以这三个核心条件为主，类目不再限定在家居/母婴。

editableUpdatedMemories.value: Prefers products with high international-station search volume and strong sales that are easy to source on 1688; category is not limited (home/baby are only a plus).

annotation.queryText: I’m trying to decide which kind of item to shortlist for a new listing, and I want to follow my usual rule: it should be something lots of overseas shoppers actively look up and it shouldn’t be hard to find a reliable upstream supplier for. Based on what you know about how I typically pick products, what type of item category should I prioritize?
